topic: Why fasting after 40 is different from fasting at 20
caption:
Fasting isn't a one-size-fits-all strategy, especially as you age! 🕰️ Your body at 40 responds to fasting very differently than it did at 20. Hormonal shifts, like declining HGH and altered insulin sensitivity, mean your metabolism, muscle retention, and even stress response have changed. 📉 What once worked effortlessly for fat loss or cellular repair might now require a more tailored approach to avoid unwanted cortisol spikes or muscle loss. Understanding these physiological shifts is key to optimizing your fasting strategy for peak health and longevity. 🧬 Swipe to discover why your approach needs an update! 👇

💾 Save this so you don't lose these crucial insights. Share with a friend over 40 who's considering fasting! Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health wisdom. Don't forget — smart adjustments lead to sustainable results! 💪
